text: A large black dog stands atop a skateboard.
A stop sign that has been spray painted.
A number of small boats docked at a commercial harbor.
A boy is smiling and holding up a product.
A man playing tennis with a racket on his hand
A commercial passenger plane flying in the air.
A colorful bus waits on the street in front of a paved brick plaza.
A plate of food with a fork, spoon and a coffee mug.
There is a foreign food sitting on a white plate.
A man jumping up on a ledge on a skateboard.
